message:
test(lifecycle): add api+contract version cross-surface agreement (ibuuh.23)

Another row of the ibuuh.23 validation matrix: cass ships two places
where an agent can ask 'what api + contract version am I talking to' —
the full cass capabilities --json block and the dedicated cass
api-version --json command. Both surfaces must agree on three fields:
api_version, contract_version, and crate_version. A silent bump in one
without the other breaks agents that negotiate via the short command
and then rely on the capabilities contract to plan calls.

New test api_and_contract_versions_agree_across_capabilities_and_api_version
parses both JSON surfaces and cross-compares all three version fields.

VERIFICATION:
cargo test --test lifecycle_matrix: 57/57 pass (file includes rows
from multiple panes' recent work), 3 consecutive stable re-runs.

Follow-up slice on coding_agent_session_search-ibuuh.23; bead stays
open for the scheduler-backed rows that still need upstream subsystems
from in-flight ibuuh.30 / ibuuh.32.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
